title: Xtra Fruity Russian Fruit Wrap
description: A vegan-friendly Russian dish featuring dried fruit, wrapped in pandan leaves and cooked to perfection in a tandoor, resulting in a fatty and bouncy treat.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the chopped dried apricots, dried cranberries, maple syrup, and lemon juice.
Add the chopped almonds and shredded coconut to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Lay a pandan leaf flat on a surface and brush with coconut oil.
Place about 1/4 cup of the fruit mixture onto the center of the pandan leaf.
Fold the pandan leaf over the filling to form a triangle or a square shape, and press the edges together to seal.
Repeat with the remaining pandan leaves and fruit mixture.
Place the wraps in the preheated tandoor and cook for 10 minutes on each side.
Remove the wraps from the tandoor and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
